qa.verdict: PASS — the one-line fix broadens except clause to (FileNotFoundError, OSError). All 6 ACs pass. Adversarial directory case exits 0. Fail-open contract restored.
qa.user_verbatim_complaint: When a subagent uses the sentinel grant to execute a Bash command, the legacy grant file must also be consumed (unlinked), so the main agent cannot reuse it.

out_of_scope_observations.observation: Non-dict JSON stdin causes AttributeError exit 1 at data.get(). Pre-existing condition; outside lines 143-148 scope. Follow-on cycle recommended.
session_id with null byte causes ValueError in Path.unlink(), not caught by (FileNotFoundError, OSError). Pre-existing — same exit 1 at consume_grant_for_posttool line 91 before fix. Out of scope.
Cross-session-id: payload SID differs from writer SID means Edit 4 may miss legacy grant. Known limitation in dev_report.implementation_notes[0]. Out of scope per BA spec 4-edit scope.

qa.complaint_resolution_evidence: except (FileNotFoundError, OSError): at lines 143-148 catches IsADirectoryError. Adversarial test: rc=0, no traceback, sentinel consumed. All 6 ACs verified by subprocess.

complaint_element_pointer.how_located: file path from dev report; lines from diff

qa.overall_assessment: The one-line fix is correct and complete for the prescribed scope. The previous QA FAIL was IsADirectoryError not caught by FileNotFoundError alone. The fix broadens the except clause to OSError (which subsumes IsADirectoryError). Codex raised 3 BLOCKERs; all classified out_of_scope (pre-existing conditions outside the 4-edit scope limit). All 6 ACs pass. Adversarial test confirms exit 0.

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: the legacy grant file is left on disk
success_criteria_results.criterion: After subagent executes an /allow-authorized Bash command, legacy grant file is absent
success_criteria_results.verification_method: subprocess AC1 canonical and whitespace variant
success_criteria_results.evidence: subprocess exit=0 for both command variants (single space and two spaces)

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: The main agent can now match and reuse the legacy grant
success_criteria_results.criterion: Main agent cannot consume an already-subagent-executed grant
success_criteria_results.verification_method: AC1 shows legacy consumed; no legacy remains for main agent

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: Legacy grant must be consumed once, regardless of context
success_criteria_results.criterion: consume_grant_for_posttool() called unconditionally on any Bash PostToolUse event
success_criteria_results.verification_method: AC2 regression + AC1 subagent; diff verifies guard removed
success_criteria_results.details: Guard removed; AC2 confirms main-agent path still works
success_criteria_results.evidence: git diff shows guard removal; AC2 exit=0, legacy_absent=True

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: Subagents MUST NOT write new grants
success_criteria_results.criterion: userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh Step 0 exits early when agent_id present
success_criteria_results.evidence: AC3 subprocess: exit=0, no files written for subagent payload

root_cause_verification.rationale: Guard removed, consume_grant_for_posttool unconditional, dead import removed, docstring/comment updated. Edit 4 now catches OSError. Adversarial test confirms exit 0 when legacy path is directory.

regression_test_results.test: Adversarial: directory at legacy path exits 0
regression_test_results.details: Created legacy path as directory, ran hook, rc=0, no traceback, sentinel consumed

e2e_enforcement.blocking_reason: Hook-only change. BA spec marks applicability as N/A.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Finding 1 (BLOCKER): Non-dict JSON input causes AttributeError exit 1; PROPOSED_FIX: normalize data after json.loads. Finding 2 (BLOCKER): null byte in session_id causes ValueError in Path.unlink not caught by (FileNotFoundError, OSError); PROPOSED_FIX: catch Exception or ValueError. Finding 3 (BLOCKER/SCOPE-DEPENDENT): cross-SID legacy unlink gap; PROPOSED_FIX: load sentinel, unlink both SIDs. Finding 4 (OBSERVATION_ONLY): assertion count discrepancy.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 3 BLOCKERs classified as out_of_scope: pre-existing conditions not introduced by the except (FileNotFoundError, OSError): change at lines 143-148, and outside BA spec 4-edit scope. Finding 1: data.get() at line 80 outside changed lines. Finding 2: same exit 1 would occur at line 91 before fix. Finding 3: already in dev_report.implementation_notes[0]. All in out_of_scope_observations. Verdict PASS.
